nodes.name: 1. Citeste Folder Input
nodes.notes: Citeste toate fisierele PDF din folderul de input

nodes.name: 2. Clasificare Filename (Regex)
nodes.notes: Nivel 1: Clasificare rapida din filename folosind regex patterns

nodes.name: 3. Necesita AI?
nodes.notes: Daca filename-ul nu a dat un rezultat clar (confidence < 85%), trimitem la AI

nodes.name: 4a. Pregatire Text pentru AI
nodes.notes: Pregateste textul extras din PDF pentru a fi trimis la AI

parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "model": "anthropic/claude-sonnet-4",
  "messages": [
    {
      "role": "system",
      "content": "You are a document classification system for Romanian construction industry documents. You receive a PDF document's metadata and extracted text, and you must classify it into exactly ONE of 14 categories.

## CATEGORIES

1. AGREMENT - Technical approval from Romanian Ministry. Key: 'Agrement Tehnic', Ministerul Dezvoltarii. 10-20 pages. Filename: AGT, Agrement.
2. AUTORIZATIE_DISTRIBUTIE - Authorization letter from manufacturer to distributor. Key: 'autorizam pe... sa distribuie'. 1-2 pages letter format. Filename: AUTORIZATIE, Authorization.
3. AVIZ_TEHNIC_SI_AGREMENT - Combined Technical Notice + Approval. Key: BOTH 'Aviz Tehnic' AND 'Agrement' present. 13-16 pages.
4. AVIZ_TEHNIC - Technical notice only (no 'sanitar', no 'agrement'). Key: 'Aviz Tehnic'. 1-2 pages. Filename: AVT.
5. AVIZ_SANITAR - Sanitary approval. Key: word 'sanitar' ANYWHERE = this category, no exceptions. Filename: AVS.
6. CE - CE marking declaration/certificate. Key: 'CE', EU Directives, multilingual. 2-4 pages.
7. CERTIFICAT_CALITATE - Quality test certificate with results. Key: 'CERTIFICAT DE CALITATE', test results table. 1 page. Filename: CC.
8. CERTIFICAT_GARANTIE - Warranty certificate. Key: 'CERTIFICAT DE GARANTIE', warranty periods. 2 pages. Filename: CG.
9. CUI - Company registration certificate. Key: 'Cod Unic de Identificare'. Government doc. 1-2 pages. Filename: CUI.
10. DECLARATIE_CONFORMITATE - Declaration of Conformity. Key: 'DECLARATIE DE CONFORMITATE', 'HG 668/2017'. 1-2 pages. Filename: DC.
11. DECLARATIE_PERFORMANTA - Declaration of Performance. Key: 'DECLARATIE DE PERFORMANTA', EU Reg 305/2011, performance values. Filename: DOP, DP.
12. FISA_TEHNICA - Technical data sheet. Key: 'FISA TEHNICA', extensive tables with DN/PN/SDR. 3-16 pages (long). Filename: FT.
13. ISO - ISO certificate (9001/14001/45001/50001). Key: 'ISO 9001' etc. 1-4 pages. Filename: ISO.
14. ALTELE - Catch-all. ONLY when nothing else matches.

## RULES
1. If 'sanitar' in text/filename -> AVIZ_SANITAR always.
2. If BOTH 'Aviz Tehnic' AND 'Agrement' -> AVIZ_TEHNIC_SI_AGREMENT.
3. Pages >8 -> likely AGREMENT, AVIZ_TEHNIC_SI_AGREMENT, or FISA_TEHNICA.
4. Prefer specific category over ALTELE.

Respond with ONLY valid JSON:
{"category": "NAME", "confidence": 0.95, "reasoning": "brief explanation"}"
    },
    {
      "role": "user",
      "content": "{{ $json.ai_prompt }}"
    }
  ],
  "temperature": 0.1,
  "max_tokens": 200
}

nodes.name: 5a. AI Clasificare (OpenRouter)
nodes.notes: Trimite textul la AI prin OpenRouter pentru clasificare

nodes.name: 4b. Rezultat Filename
nodes.notes: Formateaza rezultatele clasificate doar din filename

nodes.name: 7. Merge Rezultate
nodes.notes: Combina rezultatele din ambele cai (filename + AI)

nodes.name: 8. Mapeaza Foldere Destinatie
nodes.notes: Mapeaza fiecare categorie la folderul de destinatie

nodes.name: 9. Muta Fisiere in Foldere
nodes.notes: Copiaza fisierele in folderele de categorie

nodes.name: 10. Genereaza Raport Excel/CSV
nodes.notes: Genereaza un raport CSV cu toate clasificarile
